description: Style Note Now storing money and credit cards goes beyond the realm of ordinary wallets. provogue adds style to your pockets with this leather dual compartment black coloured wallet. With brilliant embroidery on the interior, convenience and style is brought to you in its right proportion. Carry it with you anywhere, anytime and make that style statement. Product Details Black coloured  wallet with a brown outline and logo on the right Two main compartments and eight card holder slots with coin pockets Material and Care 100% Leather Wipe surface with dry clean cloth to avoid dust and stains Do not store in direct sunlight Size and Fit Height: 9cm Width: 12 cm Style NoteNow storing money and credit cards goes beyond the realm of ordinary wallets.
